No problem, thank you, there is prerequisite software to be installed, ie. kserve, perhaps other, in the underlying kubernetes install, is that correct?   If there is prerequisite software that is going to be made part of OOM installation, or perhaps documented somewhere?   The work is good and appreciated but I am trying to make sure platform integration is understood, so at a minimum documented.   It would be great if you can coordinate with Liam to schedule a demo on our weeklies as well.   I'll unblock the review once I get an answer to the questions.  Thanks again.
